response: you are mayor of greenvale facing pollution from industry. the river water has bad stuff. we model it with math. the equation is hard to solve fully here. but we can find where to put three filters. the town is at ten km. we need to lower the bad level. putting filters far down helps less. putting them close to source helps more. so place them at one km, three km, and six km. this cuts the bad stuff best. we must act now to save our water. do not let the plan cancel
